attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WSOOOLE.LINE_ID,
WSOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE21,
WSOOOLE.DISPATCH_DATE,
WSOOOLE.DISPATCH_RESULT_CODE,
WSOOOLE.CONTRACT_QUOTE_NUMBER, 
WSOOOLE.GES_UPDATE_DATE ,
WSOOOLE.CREATED_BY ,
WSOOOLE.CREATION_DATE,
WSOOOLE.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
WSOOOLE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE12 ,/* Release8.0*/         
WSOOOLE.RECEIVABLE_INTF_RESULT_CODE,   /* Release8.0*/    
WSOOOLE.RECEIVABLE_INTF_DATE,  /* Release8.0*/ 
WSOOOLE.BATCH_ID,
WSOOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME,
WSOOOLE.ACTION_CODE,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE20, /* Release8.0 AM Changes*/ 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER, /*REL 9 CHANGES*/
DELIVERY_OPTION, /*REL 9 CHANGES*/
ATTRIBUTE6, /*REL 9 CHANGES*/
TAA, /*Q4FY12*/
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE1,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE2,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE4,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE5,
WSOOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG, /*CDO SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS (QUICK WIN)*/
WSOOOLE.FLEXIBLE_SERVICE_START_DATE, /*Services SCM SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS(QUICK WIN)*/
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE25, /*As a part of ERP for Revenue Attribution Q3FY13*/
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE23 /*Added as part of SALES_ORDER_LINES changes for August release,2014*/,
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE14,/*ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15*/
WSOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE7
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX WSOOOLE 
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1 NSOLT 
WHERE NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = WSOOOLE.LINE_ID 
AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = (CASE WHEN WSOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC ' 
WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END) )

SELECT ESTQ.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM, 
	NSQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM, 
	ESTQ.CREATE_DTM
FROM 
	( SELECT AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM, 
			CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DTM
	  FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1 Q1
	  WHERE AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM <> ' '
	  UNION ALL
	  SELECT Q2.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,
	         Q2.CREATE_DTM
	  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SALES_ORD_LINE_QUOTE Q2 ) ESTQ
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE  NSQ
ON (NSQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM = ESTQ.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM) 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ESTQ.AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM, NSQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM ORDER BY ESTQ.CREATE_DTM ASC)=1

SELECT
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT ,            
NSOLT.SS_CODE  ,                     
NSOLT.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT ,   
NSOLT.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT  ,        
NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT ,        
NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT ,             
NSOLT.START_SSP_DATE                 START_SSP_DATE,                
NSOLT.START_TV_DATETIME               START_TV_DTM ,                 
NSOLT.END_SSP_DATE                   END_SSP_DATE ,                 
NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME                END_TV_DTM  ,                  
SOOOLE.DISPATCH_DATE                 DISPATCH_DTM ,                 
WPNB.DEPARTMENT_CODE PRINT_QUEUE_NAME  ,            
SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE21                   CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME ,
SOOOLE.DISPATCH_RESULT_CODE          DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,            
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,            
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,               
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
NULL AS BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,     
SOOOLE.CONTRACT_QUOTE_NUMBER AS AS_REPORTED_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM,   
'=' DV_DUP_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM_FLG,   
SOOOLE.GOODS_PROD_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,/* Release8.0*/ 
NULL AS ASSEMBLE_TO_SLS_ORD_LINE_KEY,
NULL AS SPLIT_FROM_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SOOOLE.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_DTM     ,/* Release8.0*/    
SOOOLE.ACCTS_RCVBL_INTERFACE_STAT_CD , /* Release8.0*/    
NULL AS SOL_SHIP_METHOD_ID,
SOOOLE.BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY ,   /* Release8.0 AM Changes*/    
SOOOLE.CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  AS CONSTITUENT_GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,  /* Release8.0 AM Changes*/    
SOOOLE.SHIP_TO_PO_NUMBER AS CUST_TRX_REFERENCE_NUM ,   /* ICW */
COALESCE(SOOOLE.DELIVERY_OPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,   /* ICW */
SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE6  AS SRC_RPTD_SHIP_TO_EMAIL_CMT ,  /* ICW */
'=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD  /* ICW */,
CAST(NSOLT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME as DATE) AS DV_BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DT,
COALESCE(SOOOLE.TAA,'=') SOL_TAA_FLG,
'=' ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE ,
COALESCE(SOOOLE.CLEAN_CONFIG_FLAG,'N') AS  PRODUCT_CONFIG_CHECKED_FLG , /*CDO SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENT(QUICK WIN)*/
(CASE WHEN SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE25 IS NOT NULL  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS CONTRACT_DURATION_ROLE,  /* As a part of ERP for Revenue Attribution for Q3FY13
*/
SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE25 AS RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT, /* As a part of ERP for Revenue Attribution for Q3FY13 */
SOOOLE.FLEXIBLE_SERVICE_START_DATE as SVC_CONTRACT_EFFECT_DAYS_CNT, /*Services SCM SALES ORDER LINE ENHANCEMENTS(QUICK WIN)*/
COALESCE(NS.FREIGHT_TERMS_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_TERMS_CD ,
COALESCE(NS.FREIGHT_PAYMENT_METHOD_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DEFAULT_FRGHT_PYMNT_METHOD_CD ,
COALESCE(NS.FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS DEFAULT_FREIGHT_ON_BOARD_CD,
NSOLT. PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT  ,
COALESCE(NRCAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY, -999)  AS  RESELLER_BILL_TO_CUST_KEY , /*Added as part of  SALES_ORDER_LINES changes for August release,2014*/
COALESCE(SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE14, 'UNKNOWN' )  AS EXTRNL_PO_LN_NUM_NAME_NUM , /* ADDED AS PART OF CSSO CHANGES Q2FY15 */
COALESCE(SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE7, 'UNKNOWN' )  AS PAK_CD 
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_OM_XXCCA_OE_ORD_LINES_EX  SOOOLE  
INNER JOIN 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT  /* changed the table name from N_SALES_ORDER_LINE TO N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV as part of DPT code changes */
ON (NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=SOOOLE.LINE_ID AND
NSOLT.SS_CODE=CASE WHEN SOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' 
WHEN SOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV' END )
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET NS
ON NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT=NSOLT.SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_PRNTQ_NSOLT_BDEPT WPNB
ON WPNB.LINE_ID=SOOOLE.LINE_ID
AND WPNB.GLOBAL_NAME = SOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NRCAL
ON SOOOLE.ATTRIBUTE23=NRCAL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT /*Added as part of  SALES_ORDER_LINES changes for August release,2014*/
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SOOOLE.LINE_ID,SOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME
ORDER BY SOOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME DESC )  =1

SELECT  
WSOOOLE.LINE_ID,                       
WSOOOLE.LINE_NUMBER,                   
WSOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
WSOOOLE.SHIPMENT_NUMBER,               
WSOOOLE.OPTION_NUMBER   ,              
WSOOOLE.GES_UPDATE_DATE  ,             
WSOOOLE.CREATED_BY    ,                
WSOOOLE.CREATION_DATE  ,               
WSOOOLE.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,              
WSOOOLE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
WSOOOLE.ATO_LINE_ID ,  /* Release8.0*/                
WSOOOLE.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE,   /* Release8.0*/              
WSOOOLE.SPLIT_FROM_LINE_ID   ,    /* Release8.0*/  
COALESCE(WSOOOLE.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG, '=')  AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,  /* ICW */
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,          
WSOOOLE.BATCH_ID   ,                   
WSOOOLE.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
WSOOOLE.ACTION_CODE,
WSOOOLE.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
WSOOOLE.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
WSOOOLE.SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
WSOOOLE.PRICING_QUANTITY
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL  WSOOOLE 
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1 NSOLT 
  WHERE NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = WSOOOLE.LINE_ID 
         AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = (CASE WHEN WSOOOLE.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' THEN 'QTC ' 
                                 WHEN GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END) )
